summary: Quick View Mode for Admin Accounting Dashboard - All tests passed. Backend APIs (/api/admin/ledger/master-summary, /api/admin/ledger/cash, /api/admin/ledger/bank) return correct data structures. Frontend Quick View mode displays 5 key metric cards, Income Breakdown (5 categories), Expense Breakdown (2 categories), and PRC Statistics (3 metrics). Toggle between Quick View and Detailed View works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Quick View mode correctly fetches data from 3 new ledger endpoints on page load
View mode toggle has proper data-testid attributes: view-mode-toggle, quick-view-btn, detailed-view-btn
All 5 key metric cards have data-testid attributes for testing
Income Breakdown shows 5 categories: Ad Revenue, Subscription, Commission, Interest, Penalty/Forfeit
Expense Breakdown shows 2 categories: Operational Expenses, Redemption Payouts
PRC Statistics shows 3 metrics: Total PRC in System, INR Liability, Conversion Rate
Values show ₹0.00 as expected since ledger has no data yet
PRC Statistics correctly shows actual PRC in system (1,11,828.62) from user balances
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing admin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick View mode for Admin Accounting Dashboard fully tested. The dashboard is at /admin/accounting. Quick View is the default mode showing simplified metrics. Detailed View shows full dashboard with tabs. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing. The ledger collections (cash_ledger, bank_ledger, ad_revenue_ledger, etc.) are empty so values show ₹0.00, but PRC Statistics correctly aggregates from user balances.

TestMasterSummaryAPI.test_master_summary_response_structure: PASSED - Has income, expense, net_profit_loss, prc_stats

TestCashLedgerAPI.test_cash_ledger_response_structure: PASSED - Has entries, total, current_balance, page

TestBankLedgerAPI.test_bank_ledger_response_structure: PASSED - Has entries, total, current_balance, page

Quick_View_Mode.view_mode_toggle: PASSED - Toggle container found with data-testid='view-mode-toggle'
Quick_View_Mode.quick_view_button: PASSED - Button found with data-testid='quick-view-btn', active by default

Detailed_View_Mode.toggle_to_detailed: PASSED - Clicking Detailed button switches view
Detailed_View_Mode.tabs_visible: PASSED - Overview tab and other tabs visible

Toggle_Functionality.switch_to_detailed: PASSED - Detailed View button becomes active
Toggle_Functionality.switch_back_to_quick: PASSED - Quick View Dashboard displayed after toggle

observations.data_values: All income/expense values show ₹0.00 as ledger collections are empty
observations.prc_stats: PRC Statistics correctly shows 1,11,828.62 PRC in system from user balances
observations.conversion_rate: Conversion rate correctly shows 1 INR = 10 PRC
observations.console_warnings: Minor console warnings about React state updates and IndexedDB - not affecting functionality
